final_decision.exact_quote: 1. Close the challenge window, then reopen it using the same challenge link.
final_decision.justification: [NORMAL_FAQ] grounded generation; retrieval_score=0.99; verifier=pass; product_area_snapped=HackerRank->screen; exact_quote_source=deterministic_fallback
final_decision.response: If you are experiencing issues with submissions not working on HackerRank, you can try the following steps: Close the challenge window and reopen it using the same challenge link, open the challenge in another supported browser, and ensure your internet connection is stable.
